name: Guangzhou Shiyuan Electronic Technology Company Limited
summary: Guangzhou Shiyuan Electronic Technology Company Limited engages in the design, development, and sale of LCD main boards, intelligent interactive panels, medical devices, and related intelligent hardware in the People's Republic of China. It also offers interactive flat panels, and software and peripheral products; smart home and automotive electronics; and artificial intelligence products, as well as corporate services. The company markets its products under the seewo and MAXHUB brand names. Its products are used in education and commercial sectors. In addition, the company offers medical devices for home and hospital use under the Xicoo brand name. Guangzhou Shiyuan Electronic Technology Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
